description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a distinctive multi-colored hip roof, featuring orange, gray, and white triangular sections. The exterior walls are a light beige color, and the property is enclosed by a combination of wooden and metal fencing. The front yard includes a small tree and a paved area, while the backyard is more open with a wooden privacy fence. Windows and doors are visible on multiple sides, with the main entryway located at the front, adjacent to a driveway and a gate. The house has a compact, rectangular footprint and appears to be constructed primarily from masonry and wood, with some metal and glass elements.
description: A single-story beige house with a multi-colored hip roof, surrounded by mixed fencing and featuring a small front yard and paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, metal gate, and a small tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long beige wall, a large section of the orange and white roof, and the backyard with a wooden fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden privacy fence, a back door, and a paved backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, additional fencing, and a glimpse of the front yard and tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, adjacent window, paved approach, and metal gate; no porch or overhang.
